name: Apparatus of Kwalish
description: This item first appears to be a sealed iron barrel weighing 500 pounds. The barrel has a hidden catch, which can be found with a successful DC 20 Intelligence (Investigation) check. Releasing the catch unlocks a hatch at one end of the barrel, allowing two Medium or smaller creatures to crawl inside. Ten levers are set in a row at the far end, each in a neutral position, able to move up or down. When certain levers are used, the apparatus transforms to resemble a giant lobster.

compartment.sealed: Airtight and watertight when hatch closed
compartment.air_capacity: 10 hours of breathing (divided by number of creatures)
compartment.pressure_damage: 2d6 Bludgeoning damage per minute below 900 feet

levers.up: Side window shutters open (2 per side)
levers.down: Side window shutters close (2 per side)

levers.up: Claws attack: +8 to hit, reach 5ft, 7 (2d6) Bludgeoning damage
levers.down: Claws attack: +8 to hit, reach 5ft, target Grappled (escape DC 15)

levers.up: Apparatus sinks up to 20 feet (in liquid)
levers.down: Apparatus rises up to 20 feet (in liquid)

operation.lever_return: Each lever returns to neutral after use

activation.description: Use Utilize action to move up to two levers

notes: This is a complex vehicle requiring careful lever management. Each pilot can operate up to two levers per action. The apparatus is heavily armored and can engage in combat.
